---
name: Bug report
about: Skill install failure or unexpected CLI behavior
labels: bug
---

### Command run

```sh
npx copilot-skills <paste command here>
```

### Expected behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

### Actual behavior

Paste the full terminal output including any error messages.

### Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- Node.js version: <!-- node --version -->
- copilot-skills version: <!-- npx copilot-skills --version -->
